name: 7-Zip
description: Free, open-source archive utility for Windows. Compresses and extracts ZIP, RAR, 7z, tar, ISO, and many more formats.

name: Audacity
description: Free, open-source audio editor for recording, trimming, mixing, and mastering audio files. Supports VST plugins.

name: FileHippo
description: Safe, verified Windows software downloads. Browse thousands of apps with version history and clean installers.

name: GIMP
description: Free and open-source image editor with layer support, filters, and scripting. A capable alternative to Adobe Photoshop.

name: Ninite
description: Install and update multiple Windows apps in one click with no toolbars or junk. The fastest way to set up a new PC.

name: OBS
description: Industry-standard open-source streaming and recording software. Supports scenes, overlays, and multiple output formats.

name: Speedtest
description: Test your internet connection's download, upload, and ping speeds against servers worldwide. Free and instant.

name: VLC
description: Free, open-source media player that plays virtually any video or audio format. Lightweight, cross-platform, no codecs needed.

name: Internet Archive
description: Non-profit digital library with millions of free books, movies, music, software, and the Wayback Machine.

name: SoundCloud
description: Stream and download music from indie artists worldwide. Huge library of free-to-stream tracks and mixes.

name: LibreOffice
description: Free, open-source office suite. Full replacement for Microsoft Office — Writer, Calc, Impress, and more.

name: OBS Studio
description: Free, open-source screen recording and live streaming software. Used by millions of streamers worldwide.

name: VLC Media Player
description: Plays virtually any video or audio format. Free, open-source, no codecs needed, works on all platforms.

name: Audacity
description: Free, open-source audio editor and recorder. Edit, mix, and master audio tracks on Windows, Mac, and Linux.

name: GIMP
description: The GNU Image Manipulation Program — a free Photoshop alternative with layers, masks, and advanced editing tools.

name: Blender
description: Professional-grade free 3D creation suite covering modelling, animation, rendering, VFX, and video editing.

name: 7-Zip
description: Free file archiver supporting ZIP, RAR, 7z, and many more formats. Highest compression ratios available for free.
